# Bilal Belli

Software Engineer specializing in:
- DevOps CI/CD
- Java Spring Boot
- Angular
- Web Developpement Node.js ExpressJs Javascript Typescript Bootstrap Python Flask
- Azure Cloud, GCP, Azure DevOps, Jenkins, Ansible, Docker, Kubernetes, Gradle, Maven
- Postman, SonarQube, DevTools, Playwright, Robot Framework, JUnit, Pytest, DNS, IP, DHCP, Networking

Based in France, available in Montpellier, Paris, ile de france, Nantes, Toulouse, Lyon, Grenoble
